title: hieracium atratum subsp. nordlandicum
intro: Hieracium atratum subsp. nordlandicum is a subspecies of the hawkweed plant, known for its yellow flowers and medicinal properties. This plant is traditionally used to treat various health issues, including respiratory problems and digestive issues, due to its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Hieracium atratum subsp. nordlandicum include reducing inflammation, fighting infections, and promoting wound healing. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat a range of ailments.
